product_description: Mobile app for financial management targeting Brazilian freelancers with MEI (Microempreendedor Individual) legal status — focused on expense tracking, invoice generation, and DAS (monthly tax payment) reconciliation
target_audience: Brazilian freelancers aged 25-40 (designers, developers, copywriters, consultants) with MEI registration, earning 30k-150k BRL/year, managing finances via spreadsheets or no tool, with low accounting knowledge
research_goal: Why do Brazilian MEI freelancers abandon financial management tools within the first 30 days, and what jobs are currently unmet by existing solutions?

available_resources.tools: Google Scholar, Reddit (r/brasil, r/financas), App Store/Play Store reviews, G2, SimilarWeb, Receita Federal public data
available_resources.existing_data: 47 support tickets from beta users citing 'too complicated', NPS of 28 from 120 responses, 3 churned user interviews mentioning 'doesnt understand my type of work'
